<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get OAuth 2.0 Session Logout Request"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/admin/oauth2/auth/requests/logout"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Use this endpoint to fetch an Ory OAuth 2.0 logout request.
